summary: Tested virtual rooms exclusion, push providers endpoint, and dashboard room count. Fixed cache_warmer.py to exclude virtual rooms from dashboard cache. All 9 backend tests passed, frontend tests verified.
features_tested: GET /api/pms/rooms excludes virtual rooms by default (returns 30 rooms)
GET /api/pms/rooms/virtual lists all 6 virtual rooms (V-STD, V-DLX, V-SUP, V-STE, V-JST, V-FAM)
POST /api/pms/bookings/no-show-virtual endpoint exists and validates booking
Dashboard shows 30 rooms (excluding virtual rooms) after fix
Rate Manager page shows both Exely and HotelRunner badges with correct status

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw text (common.welcome, auth.signIn, common.email, etc.) - pre-existing issue

test_results.test_rooms_default_excludes_virtual: PASSED - No virtual rooms in default list
test_results.test_rooms_with_include_virtual_true: PASSED - Virtual rooms included with flag
test_results.test_no_show_virtual_endpoint_exists: PASSED - Endpoint returns 404 for invalid booking
test_results.test_push_providers_modes: PASSED - Valid modes for all providers
test_results.test_calendar_rooms_no_virtual: PASSED - No V- prefixed rooms in calendar

updated_files: /app/backend/cache_warmer.py - Fixed warm_dashboard_cache to exclude virtual rooms
seed_data_creation: None - used existing virtual rooms (V-STD, V-DLX, V-SUP, V-STE, V-JST, V-FAM)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual rooms feature is fully functional. 6 virtual rooms exist (V-STD, V-DLX, V-SUP, V-STE, V-JST, V-FAM). Dashboard and calendar correctly exclude virtual rooms (30 rooms shown). Rate Manager shows both Exely (live) and HotelRunner (shadow) provider badges. The cache_warmer.py was fixed to exclude virtual rooms from dashboard cache.

bug_fix_applied.issue: warm_dashboard_cache was not excluding virtual rooms, causing dashboard to show 36 rooms instead of 30
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added is_virtual filter to the aggregation pipeline in warm_dashboard_cache function
